PostToolUse.description: Plugin hook: auto-format Python files after edits (same as workspace hook but bundled in plugin)

SessionStart.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"SessionStart\", \"additionalContext\": \"TaskManager Dev Tools Plugin v1.0.0 loaded. Available: @Dev Assistant agent, quick-test-runner skill, security-audit skill. Type 'run tests', 'security scan', or 'generate docs' to get started.\"}}"
SessionStart.description: Plugin hook: announce plugin capabilities at session start
